items.q: How many documents can I store for free?
items.a: FlyID's free tier supports up to 2 documents. Upgrade to FlyID Pro to store unlimited documents across multiple traveller profiles.

items.q: Can I store documents for my whole family?
items.a: Yes. FlyID Pro supports multiple traveller profiles, so you can organise passports and visas for everyone in one place.

items.q: What types of documents does FlyID support?
items.a: FlyID currently supports passports and visas. Support for additional document types is planned for future updates.
FlyID automatically tracks the expiry date of every document you scan and sends you a reminder before it expires — so you never get caught off guard at check-in or a visa application.

items.q: My passport details scanned incorrectly — what should I do?
items.a: Try scanning again with better lighting and a flatter angle — place the document on a dark, non-reflective surface and hold your phone directly above it. If the issue persists, make sure the MRZ lines at the bottom of the data page are fully visible and not obscured.

items.q: Does FlyID scan my biometric photo?
items.a: Yes. When you scan the chip inside a modern e-Passport, FlyID extracts the high-resolution facial image stored on it and saves it locally. This data is never sent to our servers.

items.q: Why is the chip scan failing on my passport?
items.a: Chip reading can be sensitive to positioning. A few things to try:
list: Remove any thick case from your iPhone.
Place the top edge of your iPhone near the bottom half of the passport's back cover, or open the passport to the data page and rest your phone on it.
Hold your phone completely still for a few seconds when the prompt appears.

items.q: Is my data safe if I lose my phone?
items.a: Yes. FlyID stores your data entirely on your device, protected by iOS encryption. Access to the app is locked behind Face ID, Touch ID, or your device passcode — without your biometrics or passcode, nobody can get in.

items.q: Does FlyID upload anything to a server?
items.a: No. FlyID is offline-first. Your documents, photos, and personal data never leave your device unless you explicitly use the Emergency Sharing feature — and even then the data is end-to-end encrypted and the link is time-limited.
FlyID Pro unlocks unlimited document storage, multiple traveller profiles, NFC chip scanning and biometric photo storage, and the document renewal planner.

items.q: How do I manage or cancel FlyID Pro?
items.a: All billing is handled by Apple. To manage your subscription:
list: Tap your name at the top, then tap Subscriptions.
Select FlyID Pro and choose "Cancel Subscription".
